intro:
Grindr dominates gay male dating but remains closed to other orientations and has documented security issues. Trans, bi, and pan users have little space on the platform.

Embir offers an inclusive alternative for gay and bi men, with verified profiles and reporting and blocking.

comparisonTable.embir: Full features core connection features are free

sections.title: Why choose Embir over Grindr?
sections.content: Grindr suffers from recurring security issues and an audience limited to cis gay/bi men. Embir solves these limitations with deep compatibility matching, verified profiles, and bidirectional filtering that truly respects your orientation both ways.
highlights: Bidirectional filtering — your orientation applies both ways
Verified profiles — fewer bots and fake accounts
Core connection features are free — no credit card required

verdict: If you use Grindr and want an alternative that better respects your orientation, verifies profiles, and is free — Embir is the best option in 2026.
ctaText: Try Embir free — the best Grindr alternative

faq.a: Embir has verified profiles, bidirectional filtering and reporting and blocking that Grindr doesn't offer. For LGBTQ+ inclusivity and safety, Embir is superior.
Yes. Discovery, matching and messaging are free for core connections.

faq.q: How does Embir compare to Grindr for LGBTQ+ dating?
faq.a: Embir was built from scratch for all orientations. Grindr added LGBTQ+ support gradually with often insufficient filtering.
